title: Clean up dashboard: dead pages, dep placement, SSE heartbeat
description:
Three dashboard cleanup items from the audit:

1. **Dead pages** — Prompts.tsx and Validation.tsx exist in src/dashboard/client/src/pages/ but are not routed in App.tsx. Remove them.

2. **Dependency placement** — react-router-dom is in `dependencies` but only used by the Vite-built client. Move to devDependencies.

3. **SSE heartbeat** — /api/events sends no initial heartbeat or periodic ping. Clients may timeout on idle connections. Add a periodic comment line as heartbeat (15-second interval, SSE comment format `: heartbeat\n\n`).
acceptance: react-router-dom is in devDependencies in package.json.
/api/events sends periodic SSE comments as heartbeat every 15 seconds.
notes: Found during code audit on 2026-07-06. SSE heartbeat prevents client timeouts on idle connections. The 15-second interval balances responsiveness with network efficiency.
